generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantees
Align helper declaration type with the expression in comparisons and assignments
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Use eq to declare boolean expressions, e.g., eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;
anti_patterns: Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
Do not mix types in comparisons and assignments
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
